arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou in brutal put down as Tottenham boss escalates love-hate relationship with English press jab
arts.sum: The former Celtic boss is not afraid to hold his own with reporters and has poked fun at the media in England

arts.ttl: Abu Dhabi-backed group interested in full Tottenham takeover get major update
Behind the scenes of Tottenham transfer policy as Johan Lange reveals homegrown issue fix
arts.sum: Given Tottenham's previous transfer dealings and the small number of players coming through the academy to establish themselves in the first team, one issue Spurs have had over recent seasons is naming a 25-man squad for UEFA club competition . Johan Lange has revealed that data is an element of Tottenham's transfer strategy but watching the player live multiple times and their personality is a major factor.

arts.ttl: Moore and Bergvall start in Spurs team Postecoglou should pick vs Qarabag
arts.sum: Gold's team: Forster; Gray, Dragusin, Van de Ven, Davies; Sarr, Bissouma, Bergvall; Moore, Solanke, Werner. Following all those changes at Coventry City last week, Ange Postecoglou once again has the opportunity to rotate his team but he may not want to do as many this time around as Spurs need to start strong in Europe.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou drops Tottenham Europa League team news hint and issues fresh injury update
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has indicated that Tottenham "do not really want to rotate hugely for each game" as they get set to play their first Europa League fixture. The fixture against the side from Azerbaijan is the first of eight games on Tottenham's calendar in the newly-formed league phase of the competition, with Ferencvaros, AZ Alkmaar, Galatasaray, Roma, Rangers, Hoffenheim and Elfsborg all to come before the knockout stage commences in February.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'make decision' on Son contract extension after captain's admission
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly decide whether to activate the one-year extension option in the contract of South Korean attacker Son Heung-min.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Dominic Solanke 'Set to Start' for Tottenham vs Qarabag
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur striker Dominic Solanke is on course to be included in the starting line-up against Qarabag

Everybody is so welcoming and looking after him, so do I, because he's such a lovely kid and working hard every single day, coming with the first team with that age it's not easy, you know, like sometimes you're very shy, but he's showing good personality and working hard, which is very important to me. Sonny was asked about Mikey Moore - how good he could be and if Sonny felt a responsibility as captain and a winger to help mentor him?

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham have now decided what they plan to do with Heung-min Son's contract
arts.sum: Big news coming out of Tottenham 👀

arts.ttl: Ranking the favourites to win the Europa League as Man Utd and Spurs eye glory
arts.sum: The Uefa Europa League has returned for another season, and this time both Man Utd and Spurs are among the favourites to lift the trophy. The competition is bigger than ever in 2024/25, with an extra four clubs taking the total amount of teams to 36.
